creator: edward@edcom.com
text:
When pkg_delete fails to remove a file, it leaves the package
	in the database, which will then have to be removed by hand.
	There is apparently no way to force the removal of the package.
	This happens all the time, because errors or missing files
	in packages are common.

Fix: 

Don't know.
	Probably a flag should allow errors to be ignored.
How-To-Repeat: 
	pkg_add xanim2683.tgz
	... see missing man page error
	pkg_delete xanim2683
	... see can't remove man page error
	pkg_info xanim2683
	... see that package still claims to be installed
